    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the central contribution as a copy-on-write multi-version index and the load-bearing contribution as the scheduling policy, but does not reconcile the two claims.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for several unsupported quantitative and complexity claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by overstating the novelty of LACUNA relative to Delta Lake.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
